title: Crispy Argentinian Beef Skewers
description: Garlicky and crispy beef skewers with a smoky heat, featuring massaman curry paste, perfect for a satvik-friendly meal prep dinner
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit
In a large bowl, whisk together curry paste, garlic, olive oil, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper
Add the beef pieces to the bowl and toss to coat with the curry mixture
Thread the beef pieces onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece
Place the skewers in a single layer in a dutch oven
Bake the skewers for 20 minutes, or until crispy and cooked through
Brush the skewers with lemon juice during the last 5 minutes of cooking
Remove the skewers from the oven and let rest for 5 minutes before serving
